{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-266", "name": "Incorrect Privilege Assignment"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A flaw was found in Keycloak's Fine-Grained Admin Permissions (FGAPv2) feature. An administrator with limited client management permissions can exploit this vulnerability to assign any realm role, including highly privileged roles, to a client's scope mapping. This bypasses intended security controls, allowing the injected role to be projected into a user's authentication token when they access the modified client. This could lead to unauthorized privilege escalation within the Keycloak realm.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8hcx-p7m8-gc28", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hcx-p7m8-gc28", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8hcx-p7m8-gc28"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T05:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T06:31:09Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9795", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-9795", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2482462", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30083", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30084", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30049", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30050", "https://security.access.redhat.com/data/csaf/v2/vex/2026/cve-2026-9795.json", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hcx-p7m8-gc28"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Keycloak has privilege escalation via improper scope mapping enforcement", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8hcx-p7m8-gc28", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.6.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-services"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:02Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Keycloak has privilege escalation via improper scope mapping enforcement
